tests.title: Password login survives relaunch
tests.description: Logs in with the embedded password flow, relaunches the app without resetting state, and verifies the authenticated session is restored.

tests.title: Embedded SAML login succeeds
tests.description: Opens the embedded SAML flow, completes the mock Okta SAML handoff, and verifies the SAML user is signed in.

tests.title: Embedded OIDC login succeeds
tests.description: Opens the embedded OIDC flow, completes the mock Okta OIDC handoff, and verifies the OIDC user is signed in.

tests.title: Request authorize flow signs in seeded user
tests.description: Seeds the request-authorize token, starts the authorize flow, and verifies the seeded signup user is authenticated.

tests.title: Custom SSO browser handoff returns to app
tests.description: Starts the custom SSO browser flow, completes the mock IdP handoff, and verifies the custom SSO user is signed in.

tests.title: Direct social browser handoff returns to app
tests.description: Starts the direct social browser flow, completes the mock social provider handoff, and verifies the social user is signed in.

tests.title: Embedded Google social login succeeds with system web auth
tests.description: Runs the embedded Google social flow through the real system web authentication session and verifies the Google social user is signed in.

tests.title: Embedded Google OAuth error keeps login open
tests.description: Queues an OAuth error from the Google social callback, verifies the OAuth error toast is shown, and confirms the login UI stays open without authenticating the user.

tests.title: Cold launch probe timeouts do not blink no-connection UI
tests.description: Queues transient startup probe timeouts and verifies the app stays on the login experience without flashing the no-connection screen.

tests.title: Post-logout relaunch transient probe failure does not blink no-connection UI
tests.description: Logs out, queues transient startup probe failures, relaunches, and verifies the app returns to the login experience without flashing the no-connection screen.

tests.title: Authenticated relaunch enters offline mode when the network path is unavailable
tests.description: Logs in, relaunches with the network path forced offline, and verifies the existing session stays available with authenticated offline indicators and no retry UI.

tests.title: Expired access token refreshes on authenticated relaunch
tests.description: Configures a short-lived access token, relaunches after expiry, and verifies the token refreshes successfully without entering offline mode.

tests.title: Offline mode recovers to online and refreshes the token
tests.description: Forces a refresh failure plus probe failures near expiry, verifies authenticated offline mode is entered, then verifies recovery back online with a refreshed token.

tests.title: Offline mode keeps the user signed in until reconnect refreshes an expired token
tests.description: Forces a prolonged offline window, lets the access token expire while offline, verifies the user stays signed in, and verifies reconnect refreshes the token successfully.

tests.title: Custom SSO recovers after a transient no-connection relaunch
tests.description: Logs out, relaunches through a transient no-connection state if it appears, then completes custom SSO and verifies the user is signed in again.
